description_long: This sculpture features an ornate, stylized female bust with flowing hair and elaborate decorative elements extending from the head and shoulders, reminiscent of Art Nouveau design. The face is serene and detailed, framed by organic, curling forms that resemble both foliage and abstract motifs. The sculpture is mounted on a simple rectangular pedestal, which contrasts with the intricate upper portion. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the decorative elements converging and tapering down the spine. The side views reveal the three-dimensional depth of the hair and ornamental extensions, emphasizing the dynamic, almost fluid quality of the design. The overall color palette is a mix of muted bronze and gold tones, giving the piece a classical, metallic appearance.
description: An ornate Art Nouveau-style female bust with flowing hair and decorative motifs, mounted on a rectangular pedestal in bronze and gold tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed female face, flowing hair, and symmetrical decorative extensions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the hair and the organic, curling forms extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the convergence of decorative elements and a less detailed back surface.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the three-dimensionality of the ornamental extensions.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized female bust with Art Nouveau decorative motifs
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a plain pedestal with no visible environmental context, suggesting an indoor or gallery setting.
